summary: Stocks fell while caution prevailed across most asset classes as traders considered whether earnings justified fresh advances in the artificial intelligence trade and uncertainty swirled around the Middle East.

summary: Senegal is said to pick Lazard Inc. as a financial adviser, according to people familiar with the matter, a sign the government may be studying a debt overhaul.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 16
title_cn: 7 月 16 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil steadied after a three-day rally as the US carried out another round of airstrikes on Iran following a series of shipping attacks by the Islamic Republic this week.

title: HSBC Upgrades Indian Stocks as Earnings Risk from Oil Subsides

summary: HSBC Holdings Plc. raised Indian equities to neutral citing receding risks to earnings from oil prices and strong domestic consumption, reflecting strengthening confidence in the nation’s stock market.

title: Market Is So Risk-On That Path Higher Looks Tough: Taking Stock
title_cn: 市场风险如此之大，走高之路看起来艰难：盘点
summary: Bullish equity investors have embraced a Goldilocks scenario, driving risk-on sentiment to the point where it’s harder to identify what will trigger the next leg higher.

summary: Billionaire Li Ka-shing and his family are preparing to usher in a new generation of leaders after some of their longest-serving lieutenants wrap up the sale of various assets to overhaul Hong Kong’s largest conglomerate.

title: BHP Posts Solid Full-Year Output, Sees Copper Decline Ahead
title_cn: 必和必拓全年产量稳健，预计铜价未来下跌
summary: BHP Group Ltd. posted solid full-year production despite a weaker final quarter, though it warned copper output will fall in the year ahead as grades decline at its flagship Chilean mines.

title: India Increases Fuel Export Levies as Global Supply Tightens
title_cn: 随着全球供应紧张，印度提高燃料出口税
summary: India raised taxes on exports of ‌diesel and jet fuel as the collapse of the US-Iran interim peace deal and renewed hostilities choked oil flows and tightened the outlook for fuel supply.

summary: Citigroup Inc. says its Indian corporate clients are expecting the rupee will keep weakening and are looking for products that will enable them to profit from its volatility.

title_cn: 百度转赴美港两地上市以吸引资本

title: Uber Agrees to Buy Delivery Hero in $14.8 Billion Deal

summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to buy Delivery Hero SE in a deal that values the German food-delivery company at $14.8 billion and dramatically expands the US firm’s global operations.

title_cn: 日本将购买 Nvidia Rubin 芯片为机器人构建主权人工智能

title: TSMC Hikes Sales, Spending Outlook to Signal AI ‘Megatrend’

summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. raised its spending and revenue projections for the year, reflecting its confidence that torrid growth in demand for chips and data centers will extend into 2027.

title: Hyundai to Buy SoftBank Boston Dynamics Stake in Robot Push
title_cn: 现代汽车将收购软银波士顿动力公司机器人推送股份
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. and its affiliates are moving to acquire SoftBank Group Corp.’s remaining stake in the automaker’s Boston Dynamics unit, securing full ownership of the robotics pioneer at a steep discount as it prepares to deploy its Atlas humanoid robot on factory floors.

title_cn: Brookfield 支持的数据中心公司通过 IPO 筹集 10.5 亿美元

summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. plans to spend an additional $100 billion to expand US chipmaking capacity, formalizing a pledge that’s part of a larger deal between Washington and Taipei to bring semiconductor manufacturing to American soil.

title: S. Africa Finance Chief Reviews $219 Billion Fund CEO Suspension

summary: South Africa’s finance minister said the board of the continent’s biggest money manager briefed the government on a decision to suspend its chief executive officer over alleged governance issues and that it will assess the information after talks with those involved.

summary: Fujitsu Ltd., Fanuc Corp. and two of Japan’s biggest robotics companies will work together in robot development, a move aimed at staying ahead of surging competition from China.

title: China Internet Stocks Catch an AI Lift as Beijing Warms to Tech
title_cn: 随着北京热衷科技，中国互联网股票迎来人工智能上涨
summary: China’s internet stocks are mounting a comeback after a prolonged period of lagging the broader market, buoyed by improving earnings expectations, signs of policy support and optimism around the country’s artificial intelligence progress.

title: Nvidia’s Huang Courts Japanese AI Suppliers With Pork Skewers
title_cn: 英伟达黄仁勋用猪肉串吸引日本人工智能供应商
summary: On Wednesday night, Jensen Huang was in Tokyo’s central Kanda district courting the little-known Japanese suppliers that underpin the AI supply chain.

title: Palm Beach Strikes Down Data Center Plan After Local Backlash
title_cn: 在当地强烈反对后，棕榈滩取消了数据中心计划
summary: Palm Beach County commissioners rejected a proposal late Wednesday to build a digital infrastructure hub to house AI data centers and warehouses, voting in line with the ardent opposition from local residents.

title: Nvidia Expands Toyota AI Partnership for Smart Cities, Factories
title_cn: Nvidia 扩大丰田人工智能合作伙伴关系，打造智慧城市和工厂

title: China Sends Robots Out Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
title_cn: 中国派遣机器人到世界各地学习如何做人
summary: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.

title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Vera Rubin on Track Despite Delay Talk
title_cn: 英伟达黄仁勋表示，维拉·鲁宾 (Vera Rubin) 已步入正轨，尽管谈判延迟
summary: Nvidia Corp. co-founder Jensen Huang stressed that the US company’s next-generation AI accelerator systems were in production and on track for delivery to customers, responding to reports that manufacturing snags may delay their rollout.

title: Apple Boosts AppleCare+ Monthly Prices by 50 Cents in Latest Increase
title_cn: Apple 将 AppleCare+ 每月价格最新上涨 50 美分
summary: Apple Inc. slightly raised the cost of individual AppleCare+ service subscriptions, marking its latest price increase in the face of a global memory shortage and other challenges.

title: PayPal Works With Goldman, Evercore as Stripe, Advent Make $50B-Plus Offer
title_cn: PayPal 与高盛合作，Evercore 作为 Stripe，Advent 提供 50B 美元以上优惠
summary: PayPal Holdings Inc. has been working with advisers to review strategic options, people familiar with the matter said, as Stripe Inc. and private equity firm Advent pursue a $50 billion-plus takeover of the fintech pioneer.

title: Microsoft Gives Sellers Tips to Knock Down Anthropic, OpenAI
title_cn: 微软向卖家提供击倒 Anthropic、OpenAI 的提示
summary: Microsoft Corp. is coaching its sales team on how to vigorously compete against Anthropic PBC and OpenAI, playing up shortcomings in products from the artificial intelligence firms.

title: Murati’s Thinking Machines Releases First AI Model for Broad Use
title_cn: Murati 的思维机器发布首个广泛使用的人工智能模型
summary: Thinking Machines Lab is releasing its first AI model, more than a year after former OpenAI executive Mira Murati founded the artificial intelligence startup.

title: Palantir’s CTO Sees Chinese AI Models Posing Economic Risk to US
title_cn: Palantir 首席技术官认为中国人工智能模型对美国构成经济风险
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. Chief Technology Officer Shyam Sankar said that China has developed a new vanguard of artificial intelligence models through unauthorized use of work produced by Silicon Valley AI developers, posing an economic threat to the US.

title: Burnham Upsets Labour Left Who Helped Him Become UK Premier
title_cn: 伯纳姆惹恼了帮助他成为英国首相的工党左派
summary: As reports swirl that Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood will be Andy Burnham’s pick for chancellor, the direction of his incoming UK government is causing consternation on the left of the Labour Party before he’s even become prime minister.

title: Iran and Ukraine Bring Limits of Air Campaigns Into Sharp Focus
title_cn: 伊朗和乌克兰使空袭的局限性成为人们关注的焦点
summary: Like many leaders before them, Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin are coming face-to-face with the limits of massive airpower to achieve strategic victory.

title: Ukraine Hit Two Large Russia-Linked Oil Tankers in Black Sea
title_cn: 乌克兰在黑海击中两艘与俄罗斯有关的大型油轮
summary: Ukrainian naval drones hit two large Russia-linked oil tankers in the Black Sea as Moscow and Kyiv expand the scope of their mutual maritime strikes.

title: Russia’s Elite Are Moving Billions Beyond Putin’s Wartime Grasp
title_cn: 俄罗斯精英正在将数十亿美元转移到普京战时控制之外
summary: Several of Russia’s richest people including some close to President Vladimir Putin have moved billions of dollars abroad in the past year after growing concerned about the country’s economy and the government budget.

title: Burnham Warned a Land Tax Would Risk UK Economy If Rushed
title_cn: 伯纳姆警告说，如果仓促征收土地税将给英国经济带来风险
summary: Incoming UK prime minister Andy Burnham has been propelled into power by left-wing members of the ruling Labour Party keen to raise taxes on the wealthy. Many like the sound of a long-standing idea that the former mayor of Greater Manchester has endorsed: a tax on land.

title: Netanyahu Rushes Laws to Lock in Right-wing Allies Before Israel’s Election
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡在以色列大选前急于制定法律锁定右翼盟友
summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s government is passing laws aimed at strengthening his rightist-religious political bloc before tight elections in October.

title: US Signals Modest Hopes for Trump-Xi Summit, Seeks Stability
title_cn: 美国对特习峰会表示不大希望，寻求稳定
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer signaled modest expectations for a much-anticipated summit between President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping, suggesting the September meeting will focus on assessing current commitments rather than brokering new deals.

title: Iran-US Skirmishes Worsen as Hormuz Shipping Traffic Dwindles
title_cn: 霍尔木兹航运量减少，伊朗与美国的冲突加剧
summary: The US struck Iran for a fifth straight day overnight and hit a sanctioned oil tanker near the country’s main export terminal, as tensions between the warring sides show little sign of abating.

title: UK Aims to Deliver Ballistic Missile to Ukraine by Next Year
title_cn: 英国计划明年向乌克兰交付弹道导弹
summary: The UK has signed contracts with multiple companies to develop the country’s first ballistic missile in more than half a century in a bid to both support Ukraine and reduce Europe’s reliance on American weaponry.

title: Merz Is Inching Germany Toward Backing EU Push Against China
title_cn: 默茨正在推动德国支持欧盟针对中国的行动
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz is finally showing some openness to backing the European Union’s push against China.

title: Hong Kong Police Raid Shops, Arrest Five Over ‘Seditious’ Books
title_cn: 香港警方突击搜查商店并逮捕五名涉嫌“煽动性”书籍的人
summary: Hong Kong police arrested five people on suspicion of displaying and selling “seditious” publications, the government said, in at least the third known case of the city’s national security law being applied against booksellers in four months.

title: China Tops US in Global Favorability Survey for First Time
title_cn: 中国在全球好感度调查中首次超过美国
summary: More people around the world view China more positively than the US for the first time in almost 20 years, according to Pew Research Center, with sentiment shifting even among some of Washington’s allies as the two powers compete for influence globally.

title: US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran as Peril in Strait Deepens
title_cn: 随着海峡危险加深，美国对伊朗发动新的打击
summary: The US launched more airstrikes on Iran after President Donald Trump pledged to intensify the bombardment until Tehran stops attacking ships in the Strait of Hormuz and agrees to open the waterway.

title: Trump’s Aides See China Cheating on Trade, But Shun Reprisal
title_cn: 特朗普的助手看到中国在贸易上作弊，但避免报复
summary: Within President Donald Trump’s trade team, two sobering conclusions are emerging: China is cheating on its trade deal. And the US isn’t going to do much about it.

title: New York Times Fights Reporters’ Subpoenas in Air Force One Case
title_cn: 《纽约时报》在空军一号案件中对抗记者传票
summary: The New York Times refused to let its reporters testify in front of a federal grand jury after they were subpoenaed by the Trump administration over a story about security issues with an Air Force One plane donated by Qatar.

title: Ken Griffin Gives Millions to Back GOP in Tight Senate Races
title_cn: 肯·格里芬捐赠数百万美元支持共和党在激烈的参议院竞选中
summary: Ken Griffin, one of the biggest Republican political donors, gave $10 million to the party’s main Senate super political action committee and poured in millions more to bolster candidates in races the GOP must win to hold its majority, the latest Federal Election Commission filings show.

title: Ukraine Tech-Savvy Defense Minister Fedorov Leaves in Reshuffle
title_cn: 乌克兰精通技术的国防部长费多罗夫因改组而离职
summary: Ukrainian Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov said he’s leaving the government after six months in the job following alleged tensions with the country’s military.

title: Israel Aid Vote Splits House Democrats in Sign of Growing Rift
title_cn: 以色列援助投票导致众议院民主党分裂，分歧日益扩大
summary: More than 100 Democrats, including former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, backed a House measure to block all military aid to Israel in a sign of a growing rift in the Democratic Party over how to deal with the US ally.

title: Ex-Fed Adviser Gets Three Years in Prison in China Secrets Case
title_cn: 前美联储顾问因中国机密案被判入狱三年
summary: A former senior adviser for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors was sentenced to more than three years in prison for lying to federal investigators looking into whether he shared confidential data with Chinese intelligence operatives, the Justice Department said.

title: Zelenskyy Picks Energy CEO for Premier as Kyiv Steels for Winter
title_cn: 泽连斯基任命能源首席执行官为基辅冬季钢铁公司总理
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy named the head of a state-run energy company as Ukraine’s next prime minister, underscoring his focus on preparing for the coming winter under the threat of Russian attacks.
